name: Poria
summary: It is best framed as a traditional medicinal fungus with modest modern clinical depth.
description: It is best framed as a traditional medicinal fungus with modest modern clinical depth.
safetyNotes: CNS-active potential; avoid stacking with sedatives, alcohol, sleep aids, antidepressants, or other psychoactive supplements without clinician review. Avoid pregnancy/breastfeeding use unless supervised.
contraindications: significant kidney disease or unstable electrolytes
interactions: use clinician review for high-dose extracts or chronic use.

sources.title: Poria cocos: traditional uses, triterpenoid components and their renoprotective pharmacology
Fuling-Zexie formula attenuates hyperuricemia-induced nephropathy and inhibits JAK2/STAT3 signaling and NLRP3 inflammasome activation in mice
Kaixinsan regulates neuronal mitochondrial homeostasis to improve the cognitive function of Alzheimer's disease by activating CaMKKβ-AMPK-PGC-1α signaling axis

dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Preparation varies by tradition and product form and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
